purpose: Persist Wave 5/6/7 follow-up make, run, and audit-improve receipts for the Codex Wizard operating system.

options_15_to_18.initial_blocker: agent thread limit reached because options 1-14 were still open

options_run.name: Hume
options_run.improved_wording: State, in plain language, what this situation amounts to, what is actually known, and what remains evidence-limited.

options_run.name: Zhuangzi
options_run.improved_wording: Keep each live reading separate, name what would rule it out, and only collapse readings after evidence excludes them.

options_run.name: Feynman
options_run.improved_wording: Convert the selected claim into an observable procedure with setup, pass/fail criteria, decisive measurement, and the next check to run.

options_run.name: Orwell
options_run.improved_wording: Rewrite the answer or process in plain, concrete language; remove vague labels, inflated claims, and soft process fog.

options_run.name: Popper
options_run.improved_wording: Test the strongest claim: name what would falsify it, run the smallest decisive check, and mark it killed/survived/open.

options_run.name: Factory
options_run.improved_wording: Inspect the whole-workstream queue: bottleneck, handoff boundary, leverage point, and next unblock.

options_run.name: Strategy
options_run.improved_wording: Check the whole-project purpose, execution order, drift condition, retreat condition, and return-to-sims trigger.

options_run.name: Systems
options_run.improved_wording: Check the whole loop: registry -> receipt -> scenarios -> validation -> memory, and identify coupling, drift, or second-order failure before promotion.

options_run.name: Pushback
options_run.improved_wording: Name the weakest assumption, show the risk it creates, and replace it with a tighter constraint.

options_run.name: Audit
options_run.improved_wording: Check receipt truth, fake plurality, missing lanes, controller-local collapse, and format compliance.

options_run.name: Direct
options_run.improved_wording: Return the shortest defensible answer, the immediate next action, and any blocker.

options_run.name: Alternative
options_run.improved_wording: Produce a second viable route with different assumptions, compare it against the current route, and state what would make it better or worse.

options_run.name: Reframe
options_run.improved_wording: Recast the problem when the current framing is causing the wrong work, false blockers, or premature narrowing.

options_run.name: Wildcard
options_run.improved_wording: Stress-test the menu from an unexpected angle and propose one non-obvious next move, with a blocker if the move is unsafe or unsupported.

options_run.name: All-A default substantive bundle
options_run.improved_wording: Preserve composition, first packet, reason, deliverable, and retreat condition; strengthen spawn/defer/block truth to require every lane be marked spawned/deferred/blocked and never summarized as run if unspawned.

options_run.name: All-B plurality preservation bundle
options_run.improved_wording: Clarify that lanes should spawn as real workers when runtime and user authorization allow; otherwise mark blocked or deferred and do not present them as run.

options_run.name: All-C closeout/hygiene bundle
options_run.improved_wording: Make All-C an execution bundle with explicit closeout target, done condition, drift/stale residue risk, spawn/defer/block truth, compact closeout receipt, and retreat to Direct on unverifiable claims.

options_run.name: All-of-the-above Wizard bundle
options_run.improved_wording: Make Wave 6 run options 1-17 before option 18 self-checks the whole Wizard bundle, so All-of-the-above cannot collapse into rerunning only itself.

wave_7_followup_audit_improve.audit_result: No option was killed as duplicate or weak. All options kept distinct roles. CODEX.md wording was improved to make each option operational and to preserve spawn/defer/block truth.

open: Future turns still need per-turn receipt rows before claiming follow-up options ran.
Auto-loading CODEX.md and codex-memory remains open.
Hard runtime validation is not yet wired.
